fides-cli/src/commands.rs.name: resolve_dep
fides-cli/src/commands.rs.doc_comment:
Resolve a dependency string to a Cargo.toml dependency value.

Logic:
1. If `value` is a path that exists on disk → `{ path = "..." }`
2. If `version_override` is set → `"<version>"`
3. Check crates.io for `value` → if found, use latest version
4. Warn and fall back to `{ path = "<value>" }`

fides-cli/src/commands.rs.name: check_crates_io
fides-cli/src/commands.rs.doc_comment: Check crates.io for a crate and return its latest version, if found.

(

    version: Option<&str>,

fides-core/src/async_runtime.rs.name: FIDES_RUNTIME
fides-core/src/async_runtime.rs.doc_comment:
The shared tokio runtime for this dylib.

Initialized on first use. One runtime per dylib, shared across all
plugin implementations.

fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.name: FIDES_MAGIC
fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.doc_comment: Magic bytes identifying a Fides plugin registry.

fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.name: REGISTRY_VERSION
fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.doc_comment: Current version of the `PluginRegistry` struct layout.

fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.name: ABI_VERSION
fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.doc_comment: Current version of the `PluginDescriptor` struct layout.

fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.name: BufferStrategyKind
fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.doc_comment:
Buffer management strategy for an interface.

Selected per-trait via `#[plugin_interface(buffer = ...)]`.
Determines the FFI function pointer signatures in the vtable.

fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.name: WireFormat
fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.doc_comment:
Wire serialization format.

Determined at compile time via `cfg(debug_assertions)`.
Host rejects plugins compiled with a mismatched format.

fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.name: PluginRegistry
fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.signature: { magic: [u8; 8], registry_version: u32, plugin_count: u32, descriptors: *const *const PluginDescriptor }
fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.doc_comment:
Top-level registry exported by every Fides plugin dylib.

Each dylib exports exactly one `FIDES_PLUGIN_REGISTRY` static symbol
pointing to this struct. The registry contains pointers to one or more
`PluginDescriptor`s (supporting multiple plugins per dylib).

# Safety

- `descriptors` must point to a valid array of `plugin_count` pointers.
- Each pointer in the array must point to a valid `PluginDescriptor`.
- All pointed-to data must have `'static` lifetime (typically link-time constants).

fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.name: PluginRegistry
fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.doc_comment:
All types use `#[repr(C)]` layout and are read directly from dylib memory.
These types form the stable C ABI contract between host and plugin.

FFI descriptor and registry types for the Fides plugin framework.

fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.name: PluginRegistry
fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.doc_comment:
All types use `#[repr(C)]` layout and are read directly from dylib memory.
These types form the stable C ABI contract between host and plugin.

FFI descriptor and registry types for the Fides plugin framework.

fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.name: PluginDescriptor
fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.signature: { abi_version: u32, interface_name: *const c_char, interface_hash: u64, interface_version: u32, capabilities: u64, wire_...
fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.doc_comment:
Metadata descriptor for a single plugin within a dylib.

Contains all information the host needs to validate and call the plugin
without executing any plugin code. All string fields are pointers to
static, null-terminated C strings embedded in the dylib.

# Safety

- `interface_name` and `plugin_name` must point to valid, null-terminated,
UTF-8 C strings with `'static` lifetime.
- `vtable` must point to a valid `#[repr(C)]` vtable struct matching the
interface identified by `interface_name` and `interface_hash`.
- When `buffer_strategy == PluginAllocated`, `free_buffer` must be `Some`.
- All pointed-to data must outlive any `PluginHandle` derived from this descriptor.

fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.name: PluginDescriptor
fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.doc_comment:
All types use `#[repr(C)]` layout and are read directly from dylib memory.
These types form the stable C ABI contract between host and plugin.

FFI descriptor and registry types for the Fides plugin framework.

fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.name: PluginDescriptor
fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.doc_comment:
All types use `#[repr(C)]` layout and are read directly from dylib memory.
These types form the stable C ABI contract between host and plugin.

FFI descriptor and registry types for the Fides plugin framework.

fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.name: DescriptorPtr
fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.doc_comment:
A `Sync` wrapper for a raw pointer to a `PluginDescriptor`.

Used in static contexts where a `*const PluginDescriptor` needs to live
in a `static` variable (which requires `Sync`). The pointed-to descriptor
must have `'static` lifetime.

fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.name: DescriptorPtr
fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.doc_comment:

fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.name: interface_name_str
fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.doc_comment:
Read the `interface_name` field as a Rust `&str`.

# Safety

`interface_name` must point to a valid, null-terminated, UTF-8 C string
that outlives the returned reference.

fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.name: plugin_name_str
fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.doc_comment:
Read the `plugin_name` field as a Rust `&str`.

# Safety

`plugin_name` must point to a valid, null-terminated, UTF-8 C string
that outlives the returned reference.

fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.name: buffer_strategy_kind
fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.doc_comment: Returns the `buffer_strategy` field as a `BufferStrategyKind`.

fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.name: wire_format_kind

fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.name: has_capability
fides-core/src/descriptor.rs.doc_comment: Check if the given optional method capability bit is set.

fides-core/src/error.rs.name: PluginError
fides-core/src/error.rs.signature: { code: String, message: String, details: Option<String> }
fides-core/src/error.rs.doc_comment:
Error returned by plugin method implementations to signal business logic failures.

Serialized across the FFI boundary via the wire format. The host deserializes
this from the output buffer when the FFI shim returns `STATUS_PLUGIN_ERROR`.

The `details` field is stored as a JSON string (not `serde_json::Value`)
so that it serializes correctly under both JSON and bincode wire formats.

fides-core/src/error.rs.name: PluginError
fides-core/src/error.rs.doc_comment: Error types for the Fides plugin framework.

fides-core/src/error.rs.name: new
fides-core/src/error.rs.signature: (code: impl Into<String>, message: impl Into<String>) -> Self

fides-core/src/error.rs.name: with_details
fides-core/src/error.rs.signature:
(
        code: impl Into<String>,
        message: impl Into<String>,
        details: serde_json::Value,
    ) -> Self
fides-core/src/error.rs.doc_comment:
Create a new `PluginError` with structured details.

The `serde_json::Value` is serialized to a JSON string for storage.

fides-core/src/error.rs.name: details_value
fides-core/src/error.rs.doc_comment:
Parse the `details` field back into a `serde_json::Value`.

Returns `None` if details is absent or fails to parse.

fides-core/src/error.rs.name: PluginError
fides-core/src/error.rs.doc_comment: Error types for the Fides plugin framework.

fides-core/src/error.rs.doc_comment: Error types for the Fides plugin framework.

fides-core/src/hash.rs.name: fnv1a
fides-core/src/hash.rs.doc_comment: Compute the FNV-1a 64-bit hash of a byte slice.

fides-core/src/hash.rs.name: interface_hash
fides-core/src/hash.rs.doc_comment:
Compute the interface hash from a set of method signatures.

Signatures are sorted lexicographically before hashing to ensure
order-independence. Each signature is joined with `\n` as a separator.

This function is **not** `const` because it allocates for sorting.
The proc macro calls this at compile time via a build-script-like pattern,
or uses `fnv1a` directly on pre-sorted, concatenated signatures.

fides-core/src/registry.rs.name: DescriptorEntry
fides-core/src/registry.rs.doc_comment: A submitted descriptor pointer. Used with `inventory` for distributed collection.

fides-core/src/registry.rs.name: build_registry
fides-core/src/registry.rs.doc_comment:
Build the plugin registry from all submitted descriptors.

Allocates a `Vec` of descriptor pointers and leaks it to get a `'static` pointer.
Called once; the result is cached in `OnceLock`.

fides-core/src/registry.rs.name: get_registry
fides-core/src/registry.rs.doc_comment:
Get or build the plugin registry.

Returns a `'static` reference to the registry. Built on first call,
cached for subsequent calls.

fides-core/src/registry.rs.name: REGISTRY
fides-core/src/registry.rs.doc_comment:
`fides_get_registry` export function that the host calls via `dlsym`.
Plugin crates call `fides_plugin_registry!()` once in their lib.rs to emit the
Each `#[plugin_impl]` submits its `PluginDescriptor` pointer via `inventory::submit!`.

Plugin registry assembly for multi-plugin dylibs.

fides-core/src/registry.rs.name: fides_plugin_registry
fides-core/src/registry.rs.doc_comment:
Emit the `fides_get_registry` export function.

Call this once in your plugin cdylib's `lib.rs`. The host calls
`dlsym("fides_get_registry")` and invokes it to get the registry.

```ignore
fides::fides_plugin_registry!();
```

fides-core/src/status.rs.name: STATUS_OK
fides-core/src/status.rs.doc_comment: Method executed successfully. Output buffer contains the serialized result.

fides-core/src/status.rs.name: STATUS_BUFFER_TOO_SMALL
fides-core/src/status.rs.doc_comment:
Output buffer was too small (CallerAllocated/Arena strategies only).
The `out_len` parameter contains the required size. Retry with a larger buffer.

fides-core/src/status.rs.name: STATUS_SERIALIZATION_ERROR
fides-core/src/status.rs.doc_comment:
Serialization or deserialization failed at the FFI boundary.
This indicates a bug in the generated shims or a type mismatch.

fides-core/src/status.rs.name: STATUS_PLUGIN_ERROR
fides-core/src/status.rs.doc_comment:
The plugin method returned an error. The output buffer contains a
serialized `PluginError` with details.

fides-core/src/status.rs.name: STATUS_PANIC
fides-core/src/status.rs.doc_comment:
A panic was caught at the `extern "C"` boundary via `catch_unwind`.
The output buffer may contain a panic message string, but this is not guaranteed.

fides-core/src/wire.rs.name: WIRE_FORMAT
fides-core/src/wire.rs.doc_comment: The wire format active in this build.

fides-core/src/wire.rs.name: WIRE_FORMAT
fides-core/src/wire.rs.doc_comment: The wire format active in this build.

fides-core/src/wire.rs.name: WireError
fides-core/src/wire.rs.doc_comment: Errors that can occur during wire serialization or deserialization.

fides-core/src/wire.rs.name: serialize
fides-core/src/wire.rs.doc_comment:
Serialize a value using the active wire format.

Returns JSON bytes in debug builds, bincode bytes in release builds.

fides-core/src/wire.rs.name: deserialize
fides-core/src/wire.rs.doc_comment:
Deserialize a value from the active wire format.

Expects JSON bytes in debug builds, bincode bytes in release builds.

fides-host/src/handle.rs.name: PluginHandle
fides-host/src/handle.rs.signature: { _library: Arc<Library>, vtable: *const c_void, free_buffer: Option<unsafe extern "C" fn(*mut u8, usize)>, capabilities...
fides-host/src/handle.rs.doc_comment:
A handle to a loaded plugin, ready for calling methods.

Holds an `Arc<Library>` to keep the dylib loaded as long as any handle exists.
Call methods via `call_method()` which handles serialization, FFI, and cleanup.

fides-host/src/handle.rs.name: PluginHandle
fides-host/src/handle.rs.doc_comment: PluginHandle — type-safe proxy for calling plugin methods via FFI.

fides-host/src/handle.rs.signature:
(
        library: Arc<Library>,
        vtable: *const c_void,
        free_buffer: Option<unsafe extern "C" fn(*mut u8, usize)>,
        capabilities: u64,
        info: PluginInfo,
    ) -> Self
fides-host/src/handle.rs.doc_comment: Create a new PluginHandle from a loaded plugin.

fides-host/src/handle.rs.name: from_loaded
fides-host/src/handle.rs.doc_comment: Create a PluginHandle from a LoadedPlugin.

fides-host/src/handle.rs.name: call_method
fides-host/src/handle.rs.doc_comment:
Call a plugin method by vtable index.

Serializes the input, calls the FFI function pointer at the given index,
checks the status code, deserializes the output, and frees the plugin-allocated buffer.

# Arguments
* `index` - The method index in the vtable (0-based, in declaration order)
* `input` - The input argument to serialize and pass to the plugin

fides-host/src/handle.rs.doc_comment: Check if an optional method is supported (capability bit is set).

Scans directories for dylib files, loads each, validates,

Searches all configured paths for a dylib containing a plugin
with the given name. Returns the loaded plugin ready for calling.

fides-host/src/signing.rs.name: verify_signature
fides-host/src/signing.rs.doc_comment:
Verify a plugin dylib's signature against trusted public keys.

Reads the dylib bytes and the detached `.sig` file, then verifies
the Ed25519 signature against each trusted key until one matches.

# Errors

- `LoadError::SignatureRequired` if the `.sig` file doesn't exist
- `LoadError::SignatureInvalid` if no trusted key verifies the signature
